config.goal: Improve the progress-report repo's first-run UX, usability, and broad adaptability through clearer onboarding, samples, and compatibility guidance.
config.verify: =Get-Content -Raw 'README.md'; =Get-Content -Raw 'commands/progress-report.md'; =Get-Content -Raw 'skills/progress-report/SKILL.md'; =Get-Content -Raw 'samples/example-config.yaml'; =0; if( -notmatch '中文快速上手'){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'Quick Mode'){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'Full Mode'){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'Compatibility'){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'samples/example-output-email.md'){ ++ }; if(-not (Test-Path 'docs/getting-started.md')){ ++ }; if(-not (Test-Path 'docs/compatibility.md')){ ++ }; if(-not (Test-Path 'samples/example-output-email.md')){ ++ }; if(-not (Test-Path 'samples/example-output-chat.md')){ ++ }; if(-not (Test-Path 'samples/example-output-report.md')){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'Quick Mode' -or  -notmatch 'Full Mode'){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'Quick Mode' -or  -notmatch 'Full Mode'){ ++ }; if( -notmatch 'weekly-email' -or  -notmatch 'group-meeting' -or  -notmatch 'quick-sync'){ ++ }; Write-Output
